docs.title: MikuAPI
docs.text:
Fast. Simple. Built from scratch.

MikuAPI is a lightweight ASGI web framework designed for simplicity and performance.

docs.title: Quick Start
docs.text:
from mikuapi import MikuAPI

app = MikuAPI()

@app.get("/") def home(): return {"message": "Hello from MikuAPI"}

Run:

mikuapi run main:app --reload

docs.title: Authentication
docs.text:
from mikuapi.security.jwt import encode

@app.post("/login") def login(username: str): return {"token": encode({"user": username})}

from mikuapi.security.auth import require_user from mikuapi import Depends

@app.get("/me") def me(user = Depends(require_user)): return user

docs.title: CLI
docs.text:
mikuapi run main:app

mikuapi run main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000 --reload

mikuapi info

mikuapi version

docs.title: Dependency Injection
docs.text:
from mikuapi import Depends

def get_user(): return {"name": "miku"}

@app.get("/me") def me(user = Depends(get_user)): return user

docs.title: Create App
docs.text:
from mikuapi import MikuAPI

app = MikuAPI()

@app.get("/") def home(): return {"msg": "Hello"}
